name: google-calendar
title: Google Calendar
description: Manage your Google calendar easily. Create events, search contacts, and check out your upcoming schedule.
author: thomas

commands.name: create-event
commands.title: Create Event
commands.subtitle: Google Calendar
commands.description: Creates an event in your Google Calendar

commands.name: create-quick-event
commands.title: Create Quick Event
commands.subtitle: Google Calendar
commands.description: Creates a quick event in your Google Calendar

commands.name: list-events
commands.title: List Events
commands.description: View your upcoming Google Calendar events
commands.subtitle: Google Calendar

preferences.name: openCommandJoinsMeeting
preferences.title: Advanced
preferences.label: Join meeting
preferences.description: Change the default behavior when opening an event to directly join the meeting (if a meeting link is available)

tools.name: create-event
tools.title: Create Event
tools.description: Creates a new event in the user's Google Calendar

tools.name: search-contacts
tools.title: Search Contacts
tools.description: Searches the user's Google Contacts

tools.name: delete-event
tools.title: Delete Event
tools.description: Deletes an event from the user's Google Calendar

tools.name: edit-event
tools.title: Edit Event
tools.description: Edits an existing event in the user's Google Calendar

tools.name: search-events
tools.title: Search Events
tools.description: Searches events from the user's Google Calendar

tools.name: get-event
tools.title: Get Event
tools.description: Gets complete details for a Google Calendar event by ID

tools.name: respond-to-event
tools.title: Respond to Event
tools.description: Accepts, declines, tentatively accepts, or resets the user's response to an invitation

tools.name: suggest-time
tools.title: Suggest Time
tools.description: Finds actual meeting slots from attendee availability, work hours, weekends, duration, and timezone

tools.name: move-event
tools.title: Move Event
tools.description: Moves a standard event to another Google Calendar and changes its organizer

tools.name: list-event-instances
tools.title: List Event Instances
tools.description: Lists individual occurrences and exceptions of a recurring Google Calendar event

tools.name: quick-add-event
tools.title: Quick Add Event
tools.description: Lets Google Calendar parse natural-language text and create an event

tools.name: import-event
tools.title: Import Event
tools.description: Imports a private copy of an external iCalendar event

tools.name: check-availability
tools.title: Check Availability
tools.description: Checks the availability of potential attendees for a given time period

tools.name: get-current-user
tools.title: Get Current User
tools.description: Returns information about the currently authenticated user

tools.name: get-current-time
tools.title: Get Current Time
tools.description: Returns the current time of the user in the user's timezone

tools.name: list-calendars
tools.title: List Calendars
tools.description: Lists rich user-specific Google Calendar metadata with pagination and access filters

tools.name: manage-calendar-labels
tools.title: Manage Calendar Labels
tools.description: Lists, creates, renames, recolors, or deletes custom event labels on a calendar

tools.name: set-event-label
tools.title: Set Event Label
tools.description: Assigns or removes a calendar's custom label on an event

tools.name: manage-calendar
tools.title: Manage Calendar
tools.description: Gets, creates, updates, or deletes secondary Google Calendar metadata

tools.name: manage-calendar-list
tools.title: Manage Calendar List
tools.description: Gets, adds, updates, or removes user-specific Google Calendar list settings

tools.name: manage-calendar-sharing
tools.title: Manage Calendar Sharing
tools.description: Lists, gets, grants, updates, or revokes Google Calendar access rules

tools.name: get-calendar-settings
tools.title: Get Calendar Settings
tools.description: Reads one or lists all read-only Google Calendar user settings

tools.name: get-calendar-colors
tools.title: Get Calendar Colors
tools.description: Returns the current Google Calendar event and calendar color palettes

preferences.name: addSignature
preferences.title: Advanced
preferences.label: Add Signature
preferences.description: Add a signature that the event was created using Raycast to the description of the event

preferences.name: defaultEventDuration
preferences.title: Default Event Duration
preferences.description: The default duration for new events

preferences.name: sendInvitations
preferences.title: Send Invitations
preferences.description: Whether to send email invitations (including meeting links) to guests when creating or editing events

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
